import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useCart } from '../context/CartContext'; import './Navbar.css'; const Navbar = ({ currentPage, setCurrentPage, openAppointmentModal, openCart, currentUser, onLogout }) => { const { getCartCount, getCartTotal } = useCart(); const [isMobileMenuOpen, setIsMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false); const [showUserMenu, setShowUserMenu] = useState(false); const cartCount = getCartCount(); const cartTotal = getCartTotal(); const toggleMobileMenu = () => { setIsMobileMenuOpen(!isMobileMenuOpen); }; const handleNavClick = (page) => { setCurrentPage(page); setIsMobileMenuOpen(false); // Close mobile menu after navigation }; return ( <> {/* Top Header Section */}
{/* Contact Info */}

{/* Social Media Icons */}
{/* Main Navigation */}
{/* Logo Section */}
Gems of Insight
{/* Mobile Menu Toggle */} {/* Desktop Navigation Links */}
    • {/* Mobile-only items */}
{/* Right Section - Desktop Only */}
{currentUser ? (
setShowUserMenu(!showUserMenu)}>
{currentUser.firstName?.charAt(0) || currentUser.name?.charAt(0) || 'U'}
Hi, {currentUser.firstName || currentUser.name || 'User'} {showUserMenu && (
)}
) : (
setCurrentPage('login')}> Login
)}
{cartCount > 0 && {cartCount}}
[ {cartCount} ] Basket KSH {cartTotal.toLocaleString()}
{/* Mobile Cart - Always Visible */}
{cartCount > 0 && {cartCount}}
KSH {cartTotal.toLocaleString()}
); }; export default Navbar;
